chart.title: Reported maternal mortality rate
chart.subtitle: Reported annual death rate from [maternal conditions](#dod:maternal-mortality) per 100,000 women and girls, based on official statistics from each country. This includes late maternal deaths that occur up to 1 year after the end of pregnancy. Due to limited reporting, figures are lower than the true number of maternal deaths.
chart.note: To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is [age-standardized](#dod:age_standardized). All deaths in a country may not have been registered with a [cause of death](#dod:underlying-cause-of-death).

descriptionKey: The International Classification of Diseases (Version 10) codes that define maternal conditions are O00-O99.
